tasks.subject: Phase 0: Scaffolding & verification harness
tasks.description: Add tsconfig.json at repo root, scripts/check-build.sh, scripts/check-invariants.sh, scripts/smoke.sh, extensions/_debug.ts, and wire debug markers into existing extensions. Commit as Phase 0 on branch refactor/ui-orchestration.

tasks.subject: Phase 1: Introduce UIBus + extensions/ui/ shell
tasks.description: Create extensions/ui/bus.ts with publishMode/publishUndo/publishOrchestration/publishWorking helpers. Create extensions/ui/index.ts that subscribes to harness.ui:publish, maintains slots Map, clears on reload. Register in harness manifest. Commit as Phase 1.

tasks.subject: Phase 2: Migrate modes.ts and pi-undo-redo.ts to UIBus
tasks.description: Add publishMode/publishUndo calls alongside existing setStatus calls in modes.ts and pi-undo-redo.ts (dual-publish). Import from ./ui/bus.ts. Do not remove setStatus yet. Commit as Phase 2.

tasks.subject: Phase 3: Lift footer/editor/working into extensions/ui/
tasks.description: Create extensions/ui/footer.ts, editor.ts, working.ts by lifting from zentui.ts and working-messages.ts. Delete zentui.ts and working-messages.ts. Remove dual-publish - only publishMode/publishUndo remain. Commit as Phase 3.

tasks.subject: Phase 4: Merge pi-subagents/ + pi-tasks/ into extensions/orchestration/
tasks.description: Move all files from pi-subagents/ and pi-tasks/ into orchestration/ flat layout. Delete cross-extension-rpc.ts. Remove Symbol.for, RPC calls, subagents:* events. Unify agentTaskMap. Wire task operations as direct function calls. Delete pi-subagents/ and pi-tasks/ directories. Commit as Phase 4.

tasks.subject: Phase 5: Combined widget + single ticker in extensions/ui/
tasks.description: Create extensions/ui/widget.ts consuming slots.orchestration. Create extensions/ui/ticker.ts with single 80ms interval. Define OrchestrationState in orchestration/. Publish from orchestration on state changes. Commit as Phase 5.

tasks.subject: Phase 6: Final invariants, debug cleanup, manual smoke gate
tasks.description: Remove _debug.ts and all PI_DBG markers. Run check-invariants.sh with all PRD §6 greps as hard fails. Audit setTitle. Verify /reload cleanup. Document setInterval audit. Commit as Phase 6.
